title: Smoky Spicy Algerian Lentil Tagine
description: A fragrant, hearty lentil tagine bursting with smoky spice and a hint of heat, perfect for a romantic dinner or cozy gathering.

ingredients.name: spice mix (smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, cinnamon)

instructions: Rinse lentils under cold water, then soak for 20 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a tagine or heavy pot over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the spice mix and cayenne pepper; cook for 30 seconds.
Add the diced carrot, sliced zucchini, diced bell pepper, and tomato; sauté for 5 minutes until vegetables soften slightly.
Toss in the soaked lentils, coating them well with the spices.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25–30 minutes or until lentils are tender.
Stir in lemon juice, season with salt to taste, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with chopped fresh cilantro, alongside crusty bread.
